descriptions: Implemented server-side authoritative payment system with lobby tracking to prevent reward exploitation
Significant client-side performance optimizations for distance-check loops and object pool searching
Fixed 'ShowHelpNotification' and [E] key interaction spamming during newspaper delivery
Resolved duplicate configuration entries in config.lua and fixed potential nil pointer errors in the quitWork function
Improved multiplayer synchronization for team salaries and lobby states between client and server
Fixed mission stop indexing logic to ensure correct delivery flow
